# Cancel an Order

An order can be cancelled directly from the order history page as long as it has not yet entered the packing stage. Once packing begins the cancel button disappears and the shopper must instead refuse shipment or start a return after the parcel arrives. Cancelling a multi-item order cancels every line at once; partial cancellation of individual products is not supported.

[Source: order_management.md#cancel-an-order]
